page.content: In the fiscal year 2024, Airbus SE's satellite constellation deployment encompasses various metrics, including Navigation Satellites with 20 units planned, 5 units launched, 15 units active, a budget of €150M, actual spend of €120M, and a variance of 20%, with a status of Operational and categorized as Under Budget. Communication Satellites are planned at 30 units, with 10 launched and 20 active, a budget allocation of €200M, actual spending of €180M, and a variance of 10%, also labeled as Operational and Under Budget. Earth Observation satellites have 15 units planned, 5 launched, and 10 active, with a budget of €100M, an actual spend of €90M, a variance of 10%, operational status, and marked as Under Budget.

lines.text: In the fiscal year 2024, Airbus SE's satellite constellation deployment encompasses various metrics, including Navigation

Operational and Under Budget. Earth Observation satellites have 15 units planned, 5 launched, and 10 active, with a budget of

page.content: The Total Constellation comprises 65 planned units, 20 launched, and 45 active, with a total budget of €450M, actual spending of €390M, a variance of 15%, operational status, and categorized as On Track. In UAV systems revenue, Commercial UAVs sold totaled 500 units, generating €150M with a growth rate of 15% and a market share of 25%, while Military UAVs sold 200 units, generating €120M with a growth rate of 10% and a market share of 15%, leading to a total of 700 UAVs and total revenue of €270M with a growth rate of 12% and market share of 20%. The headcount stands at 450, with R&D expenditure of €50M and an investment in innovation of €30M, contributing to new projects and a headcount of 5, with an additional €10M and a growth rate of 30%.

page.content: UAV production facilities number 3, generating €8M with a growth rate of 5% and a market share of 20%, while customer contracts tally at 20, with revenue of €60M, a growth rate of 25%, and a market share of 35%. UAV deliveries total 600, yielding €180M with an 18% growth rate, a market share of 22%, and total employees numbering 5,000, with revenue reaching €2B, and a variance of 10% on regional offices comprising 15, generating €5M in revenue.
